### Checklist

- [ ] `make check` is green
- [ ] Tests land with the change (agent_docs/testing.md)
- [ ] Branch is `feature/<topic>` or `ai/<topic>` off `main`; conventional commits
- [ ] Commits are signed (COMMIT-SIGNING-SETUP.md)
- [ ] No AI co-author trailers (see AI_POLICY.md)
